'''Jaan''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Jaan attended the [[New Year Fete Week/Legends|New Year Fete Week]] alongside [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]] and [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Traeda]].
